span.p:
Chi-square test of independence
· small expected cell counts <5 → Fisher's exact

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Treat as nonparametric:
Mann-Whitney / Kruskal-Wallis on ranks

span.p:
Assumptions OK?
normality per group + equal variance

span.p:
Independent t-test
· unequal variance → Welch's t-test

3+ tests → correct for multiple comparisons.
